PreToolUse.//: Hook: block-env-commit. Blocks 'git add .env*'. Always emitted.
Hook: block-deploy-cli. Blocks 'vercel *'. Emitted because deploy_target_has_cli_conflict == true.
Hook: block-worktree. Blocks 'git worktree *'. Emitted because uses_visual_confirmation_gate == true.
Hook: block-worktree. Catches Claude Code's EnterWorktree tool and Agent isolation:worktree. Emitted because uses_visual_confirmation_gate == true.
